disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Central facial erythema with visible telangiectasia and pustules but NO comedones, triggered by sun/alcohol
trigger_question_examples: Are there pustules but no blackheads/whiteheads, with background redness and visible tiny blood vessels, triggered by sun/alcohol/heat?
Do you get flushing with triggers?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, pustules but no blackheads/whiteheads, on a background of central redness with visible tiny vessels, and it flares with sun/alcohol/heat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, and the redness is bilateral/symmetrical, not hot/hard, not a sharply demarcated spreading border (facial-infection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any fever, or is the redness on one side, hot/hard, with a sharply spreading edge?
Is it symmetrical on both cheeks or spreading from one point?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever; it's symmetrical on both cheeks and the nose, not hot/hard or spreading from one point.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No eye redness, pain, grittiness or blurred vision (eye-involvement screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any red, painful, gritty eyes or blurred vision?
Are your eyes irritated, watery or sensitive to light?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my eyes are fine — no redness, pain, grittiness or blurring.
